meaning: n.绿皮(指染成绿色的马,驴,海豹等的生皮),(用作擦光物的)鲨革
examples: He takes out a little shagreen case.
In fact, a case of black shagreen, resembling a medallion portrait, was suspended from the ribbon.
Most of the furniture, a blend of classical and contemporary, is custom-made, including a three-piece dining table with a finish of faux shagreen, or stingray hide.
